# =============================================================================
# Rubric4Setwise -- pip requirements
#
# Recommended install order (do NOT rely on a single `pip install -r` because
# `flash-attn` requires torch to already be present when it builds):
#
#     # 1) Rankify + all its extras
#     pip install "rankify[all]" --ignore-installed blinker
#
#     # 2) CUDA 12.4 PyTorch stack
#     pip uninstall -y torch torchvision torchaudio
#     pip install torch==2.5.1 torchvision==0.20.1 torchaudio==2.5.1 \
#         --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124
#
#     # 3) vLLM + transformers (Qwen3-compatible, see NOTE below)
#     pip install vllm==0.8.5 transformers==4.51.3 fastchat scipy==1.13.1
#
#     # 4) flash-attn (must come AFTER torch; no build isolation)
#     pip install flash-attn --no-build-isolation --force-reinstall
#
#     # 5) Uninstall stale apex if it exists
#     pip uninstall -y apex
#
# NOTE
# ----
# The pinned versions target Qwen3 (default: Qwen/Qwen3-8B). For Qwen2.5-7B
# use `transformers==4.45.2` and `vllm==0.7.0` instead.
# =============================================================================

--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124

rankify[all]
blinker

torch==2.5.1
torchvision==0.20.1
torchaudio==2.5.1

vllm==0.8.5
transformers==4.51.3
fastchat
scipy==1.13.1

flash-attn
